problem id: 63217d23
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5)

examples:
  11011011 -> 01111011
  01001001 -> 00101001
  10011101 -> 10110011
  01101110 -> 11001101
  11010100 -> 10011010
  11001111 -> 11111001
  11111110 -> 11011111
  10011001 -> 00110011
  00010100 -> 10000010
  01001110 -> 11001001

query: 00001110
predicted answer: 11000001
